_comment: SMOKE fleet for LOCAL-MODEL boxes (mini-PC, qwen35 desktop). Same shape as fleet_smoke.json but tests the local-model driver instead of API agents. Run this on the box that has the local model server, not on the main box.
_swap_agent: On the qwen35 desktop change the agent to 'hermes_qwen35_local'. Default here is the mini-PC variant.

workers._note: Local-model driver. Set KATANA_MINIPC_MODEL + KATANA_MINIPC_PROVIDER env vars first; the driver picks them up.
